name: Roly Poly

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It leans forward for a close-range bite.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it from the front or move out of its immediate range.
attacks.notes: Its basic hit before chaining into heavier moves.

attacks.name: Head Sweep
attacks.tell: It turns its head and body to sweep a wide side arc.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not remain at its flanks after a bite resolves.
attacks.notes: It punishes exactly the space where many players look for free damage.

attacks.name: Charged Roll
attacks.tell: It curls into a ball and rolls in a line until it reaches its limit or loses the target angle.
attacks.howToAvoid: Evade it or cut it short with a perfect block right at the start if your timing is good.
attacks.notes: Its most dangerous move when your arena is cramped.

attacks.name: Launch Roll
attacks.tell: It curls up and launches through the air to land on top of the player.
attacks.howToAvoid: Run laterally; do not stand still trying to tank the center of the landing.

attacks.name: Armored Heal
attacks.tell: It curls fully into a motionless ball instead of transitioning into a roll.
attacks.howToAvoid: Use the time to recover stamina or reposition; hitting it without a plan is usually inefficient.
attacks.notes: It recovers roughly a quarter of its health.

description: A gigantic upper-yard roly poly. It stays neutral until provoked, but once combat starts it becomes a rolling wall with tremendous durability.
behavior: It wanders without much purpose and barely interacts with other creatures. It can bite, sweep with its head, bounce into the air, and keep rolling for a long time if it finds a clear line to the target.
interactionWithPlayer: It only turns hostile when attacked, but then it uses its full move set and can also heal while curled into a ball. Without preparation, the fight drags on for a very long time.
interactionWithCreatures: It has no special rivalries. It simply defends itself from anything that hits it.
strategy: Busting is the strongest answer, and the three elemental weaknesses allow plenty of flexibility. The key is respecting the rolling charge and not wasting damage while it curls up to heal.
respawnInfo: 1 day by default. In the Undershed and Upper Grasslands it takes 2 days.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Bite: 138
Head Sweep: 150
Charged Roll: 175
Launch Roll: 250

specialTraits: It can heal while curled into a ball. Interrupting the animation does not stop the heal, though it can force the creature out of the stance early.
